'''[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Darnak''' was in command of the [[Radra Surveillance Post]] on the planet [[Radra IV]]. He helped fight off a [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtrooper]] attack when a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebels]] came to get equipment from the base and later joined them in evacuating aboard the [[Starhound (JS-77B interstellar shuttle)|''Starhound'']].

{{Char-stub}}
